column2: Run a Fossil Fuel Nonproliferation Treaty endorsement campaign
column3: Running a FFNPT campaign in your area is a powerful way to get commitments from local officials on phasing out fossil fuels, which can be used as an accountaibility tool later and a pathway to articulating specifically how they'll phase out. check out this guide on how to run one in your area. column2: Encourage your Mayor to join the Sustainable Mayors Network
column3: The Sustainable Mayors Network is a community of practice for local officials to exhange ideas and learn from each others' efforts.
